name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: UAC Bypass - IE Add-On Installer
notes: This Building Block triggers when the Internet Explorer Add-On Installer spawns a high integrity process when started from a COM interface.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: UAC Bypass - IE Add-On Installer on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Elevated Process (Windows)
when the event matches Parent Process Name (custom) is any of ieinstal.exe
when the event matches Parent Command (custom) contains any of -Embedding
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: UAC Bypass - IE Add-On Installer on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Elevated Process (Windows)
AND when the event matches Parent Process Name (custom) is any of ieinstal.exe
AND when the event matches Parent Command (custom) contains any of  -Embedding
